description: Defines the state machine for the workflow using the State pattern.

classes.name: WorkflowState
classes.docstring: Abstract base class for workflow states implementing the State pattern.

methods.name: execute
methods.docstring: Execute the current state and return the next state.

methods.name: get_state_name
methods.docstring: Return the human-readable name of this state.

classes.name: InitialState
classes.docstring: Initial state: validates beam structure and TPS file existence.

classes.name: FileUploadState
classes.docstring: File upload state - uploads beam-specific files to a dedicated directory on the HPC.

methods.name: execute
methods.docstring: Uploads moqui_tps.in to the remote beam directory.

classes.name: HpcExecutionState
classes.docstring: HPC execution state: runs simulation and polls for completion.

methods.name: execute
methods.docstring: Submits a MOQUI job and polls for completion.

methods.name: _wait_for_job_completion
methods.docstring: Polls HPC for job completion using commands from Settings.

classes.name: DownloadState
classes.docstring: Downloads the raw result file from the HPC and cleans up the remote directory.

classes.name: PostprocessingState
classes.docstring: Runs RawToDCM locally on the beam's output.

classes.name: UploadResultToPCLocalDataState
classes.docstring: Uploads the final result to PC_localdata by executing a local command.

classes.name: CompletedState
classes.docstring: Final completed state for a beam.

classes.name: FailedState
classes.docstring: Failed state for beam error handling.
